question: Use your search tool to find and return all documents in the database.
response:
To search for documents in the database, you can use a search engine like Solr, which is built on top of Lucene. Solr is a powerful text search engine that can help you find documents based on a search query.

To use Solr, you can create a search query and run it against your local database. Solr will then return a list of documents that match your search criteria.

Alternatively, you can also use the GlobalSearch database, which allows you to search for documents based on specific criteria. You can create a search query and run it against the GlobalSearch database to find the documents you need.

To access the search results, you can view the Search Results Pane, which will display the results of your search. From there, you can choose how your results display, take actions on selected documents, view document history, and open the documents in the Document Viewer.

Source: https://knowledge.square-9.com/gs61/search-for-documents
